title: Cohort profile update: the Johns Hopkins HIV clinical cohort, 1989-2023.
author: Lesko CR Fojo AT Keruly JC Hwang YJ Falade-Nwulia OO Zalla LC Snow LN Jones JL Chander G Moore RD
content: S-EPMC11758427 PMC11758427 Cohort profile update: the Johns Hopkins HIV clinical cohort, 1989-2023. The Johns Hopkins HIV Clinical Cohort, established in 1989, links comprehensive, longitudinal clinical data for adults with HIV receiving care in the Johns Hopkins John G. Bartlett Specialty Practice
